actions.signOutHint: Signs out and returns to the sign-in screen.
actions.darkThemeHint: Applies dark theme on this device.
actions.lightThemeHint: Applies light theme on this device.
actions.crewDensityHint: Sets decorative graph crew density to {{density}}.
actions.deleteJournalsHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting every journal entry.
actions.deleteNotesHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting every note.
actions.deleteAuditHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting every audit response.
actions.deleteBfiHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting saved Big Five results.
actions.deleteEcrHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting saved Attachment results.
actions.deleteMbtiHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting saved MBTI reference results.
actions.deleteWikiHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting every wiki page.
actions.deleteUningestedHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting captures not yet promoted to wiki.
actions.resetUsageHint: Opens a confirmation before resetting daily usage counters.
actions.fullWipeInputLabel: Full wipe confirmation. Type {{phrase}} to enable the delete button.
actions.fullWipeHint: Requires typed DELETE confirmation before wiping records, sources, wiki pages, and usage.
